company.description:
[ Skip to content](https://kintu.co/#content)
#  [Chris Osborne ](https://kintu.co)
[ ](https://twitter.com/kintulabs)
## Father | Investor | Developer
![](https://kintu.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/01/header.jpg)
I’ve spent the past 20 years building and designing great web products, and have spent the past few years digging deep into building web apps with AI. Each month I share a short list of the most impactful AI tools I’m playing with. It’s short, and you can always cancel with one click:
* * *
### About Chris
I’ve spent over 20 years building web apps.
Here’s a few projects I’m currently working on:
  * [AstroSend](https://astrosend.com) – send email newsletters with AI
  * [AI Startup Data](https://aistartupdata.com) – a database of recent AI startup funding deals
  * [Urgent Jets](https://urgentjets.com) – a marketplace for last-minute private jet charters
  * [Build Intent](https://buildintent.com) – learn how to build web apps with AI
  * [Lead Orbit](https://leadorbit.xyz) – helping startups earn more revenue with email outreach
  * [Thirsty Jobs](https://thirstyjobs.com) – a job board for the hospitality industry
  * [Startup Names](https://startupnames.xyz) – great domain names for web startups
  * [AI Depot](https://aidepot.co) – one of the biggest AI tool directories online
  * [25Mins](https://25mins.xyz) – a super simple pomodoro timer I use every day


I’m happily married (16 years) and we have 2 boys together. We split our time between Hong Kong, Japan and Thailand.
Outside of work and family time, I enjoy sailing, long walks, aviation, MMA, poker, old wines, and great coffee.
The less I own, the happier I become.
* * *
Subscribe to my [weekly newsletter →](https://kintu.co/newsletter/)
